MV2O:
Our main product is the ODigit Pattern Digitising Software System. It utilises cutting edge image processing algorithms to make pattern digitising fast, accurate and easy. The patterns it scans can be exported in Dxf format to nearly any major CAD/CAM program, including Optitex, Gerber, StyleCAD, Gemini, Assyst, Lectra and many more.
Support: +98 912 686 79 71
